description:
OL 316 (REV. 2/2017)  WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
A Cruise autonomous vehicle (“Cruise AV”), operating in autonomous mode, was traveling southbound on Divisadero Street between Pine 
and Bush Streets when another vehicle made contact with the left rear bumper of the Cruise AV, damaging the bumper and left tail light. 
There were no injuries and police were not called.
Go to Page 3
